text:
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 
VALUES: 
Dollar amount with two decimal places (e.g., 98.76); may be negative. 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 
COMMENT: 
Dollar amounts in this field represent payments made either by the state or their fiscal agent to 
providers, managed care plans, and beneficiaries or they represent payments made by managed care 
plans to their providers. 
Not
